title: More Traders
description: Adds diverse villager trades with unique professions, items, and trading options!
body:
More Traders is a Minecraft mod that enhances your gameplay by introducing a variety of new villager types, each with unique trades and abilities.  You'll encounter new professions that bring exciting items, materials, and enchantments into your game. Whether you're looking to acquire rare resources or strengthen your village community, More Traders enriches the trading experience, encouraging exploration and strategic planning in your Minecraft world.

**Added Villagers** :

- **Lumberjack Villager** : Work with wood and axes.
![Lumberjack Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b073cd51b11fd61109fb0c63e132bd59e785e0b5_0.webp)

**How to craft the Lumberjack Villager Block ?**

![Lumberjack Villager Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afce10beb67d8f5ff23e2403b0e455f550e2fc11.png)

- **Builder Villager** : Work with construction blocks and tools.
![Builder Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a35528101194ed6e9f92a875b447c071de3ac020_0.webp)

**How to craft the Builder Villager Block ?**

![Builder Villager Block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a5ffeab4a1bcd19d245562ab19fe33363d636e2.png)
